lines.speaker: Rick Turpentine
lines.text: Today is your lucky day, [sirrah/madam/my liege]! I am donating to the victims of crime to atone for my past actions!

sections.title: After completing the event, or going into a random event free zone

lines.speaker: Rick Turpentine
lines.text: I must leave you now, [sirrah/ma'am/my liege]!

sections.title: Talking to another player's Rick Turpentine

lines.speaker: Rick Turpentine
lines.text: It is someone else with whom I desire to speak, but he seems to be preoccupied.

lines.speaker: Rick Turpentine
lines.text: Good day to you, [milord/milady/my liege] [player name].

lines.speaker: Rick Turpentine
lines.text: I seek a moment of your time, [sirrah/ma’am/my liege]!

lines.speaker: Rick Turpentine
lines.text: [Milord/Milady/My liege] [player name], please speak to me!
